{{Expand}}

{{Infobox technique
| name = Visiri salute
| introduced = lh-01-the-captain
}}

== The Captain ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|A [[Visiri salute]] involves clapping a fist to the chest.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c30">''The Captain'', chapter 30</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Techniques]]
[[Category:The Captain]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
